daily_image.alt: A loving family photo for Meme

prayer.title: Our Father
prayer.text: Our Father, who art in heaven, hallowed be thy name; thy kingdom come; thy will be done on earth as it is in heaven. Give us this day our daily bread, and forgive us our trespasses, as we forgive those who trespass against us. Amen.

thought.headline: Peace can arrive gently.
thought.body: You do not need to force strength. Catholic hope is not pretending things are easy; it is trusting that Christ stays close even here, especially here.
thought.verse: Do not let your hearts be troubled or afraid. — John 14:27

blessing: May Our Lady wrap you in her mantle and bring comfort to your heart.
practice: Make today’s waiting a prayer: ‘Jesus, I trust in You.’

daily_readings.label: USCCB Daily Mass Readings
daily_readings.note: Read or listen to today’s Catholic Mass readings from the United States Conference of Catholic Bishops.
